episodes.title: ବାବାଙ୍କ ମୋବାଇଲରୁ ମିଳିଲା ଅଶ୍ଲୀଳ ଭିଡିଓ... IITian Baba Arrested | Abhishek Mishra Fake Baba |Crime News
episodes.description:
Uttar Pradesh's Mathura Police arrested a self-proclaimed godman, Abhishek Mishra alias Adikarta Narayan Das, on shocking charges of  ***. Mishra, an IIT Roorkee Mechanical Engineering graduate, left his high-paying corporate job after four years to pursue an ashram life in Mathura. He operated a popular YouTube channel named ‘Radha Krupa Amrut,’ delivering spiritual discourses in Hindi and English to target educated women. According to the police, the accused allegedly gave a nursing student from Chhattisgarh milk spiked with sedatives as 'prasad'. Once she lost consciousness.

#News18Odia #OdiaNews #odishanews #oriyanews #breakingnews #weathernews #IITianBabaArrested #FakeBabaExposed #MathuraPolice #AdikartaNarayanDas #RadhaKrupaAmrut #CrimeNews #OdishaNewsUpdates

episodes.title: IIT ବାବାଙ୍କ କଳା ରହସ୍ୟ | IIT Baba Scandal | High-Paid Engineer Turned Godman Arrested | Asala Katha
episodes.description:
IIT ବାବାଙ୍କ କଳା ରହସ୍ୟ | IIT Baba Scandal | High-Paid Engineer Turned Godman Arrested | Asala Katha

A shocking controversy has surfaced around the self-styled "IIT Baba" Adikarta Narayan Das alias Abhishek Mishra. An IIT Roorkee graduate who reportedly left a lucrative corporate career to embrace spirituality is now facing serious allegations. Police action followed a complaint by a woman from Chhattisgarh, with investigators reportedly uncovering disturbing evidence from the godman's devices.

Uttar Pradesh's Mathura Police arrested a self-proclaimed godman, Abhishek Mishra alias Adikarta Narayan Das, on shocking charges of rape. Mishra, an IIT Roorkee Mechanical Engineering graduate, left his high-paying corporate job after four years to pursue an ashram life in Mathura. He operated a popular YouTube channel named ‘Radha Krupa Amrut,’ delivering spiritual discourses in Hindi and English to target educated women. According to the police, the accused allegedly gave a nursing student from Chhattisgarh milk spiked with sedatives as 'prasad'. Once she lost consciousness, he raped and later blackmailed her. Watch the full report to know how this fake techie baba was exposed.
